summary: Completed testing of PITCH'D iteration 4 - PDF export fix and promo link updates. All critical features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export now uses proper npm imports (html2canvas, jsPDF) instead of CDN dynamic loading - more reliable
Try-catch error handling added for PDF export with user-friendly alert on failure
CrossPromo component exists but is not rendered in the main page - only PromoModal is shown after export
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified all fixes working: 1) PDF export now downloads actual .pdf file (not print dialog) using npm-imported html2canvas and jsPDF. 2) 'Export Again' button also triggers PDF download correctly. 3) PromoModal links updated - SLATR: https://www.slatr.com.au, Spot'd: https://www.getspotd.app. 4) CrossPromo component also has correct links but is not currently rendered in the UI (only PromoModal appears after export). 5) PITCHD25 promo code displays correctly in modal.

pdf_export.no_print_dialog: PASS - Direct download, no print dialog

promo_modal.appears_after_export: PASS - Modal shows after PDF download

cross_promo_component.note: Component exists but not rendered in current UI

core_flow.generate_results: PASS - AI generates titles, loglines, taglines, synopsis
core_flow.selection_flow: PASS - Can select one from each section
